scripts.dev:kill: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$p=(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique); if($p){$p | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }}"
scripts.dev:kill:all: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$ports=3000,4000; foreach($port in $ports){$p=(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $port -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique); if($p){$p | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }}}"
scripts.dev:safe: npm run dev:kill && npm run dev:clean && npm run dev
scripts.dev:all: npm run dev:kill:all && npm run dev:clean && concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c cyan,magenta "npm run backend:dev" "npm run dev"
scripts.lint: echo "Lint tooling intentionally excluded for clean audit surface"
